prompt: For the self-hosted-application-platform capability tech requirements, add: TR-04: use Postgres for tenant metadata storage with logical replication for cross-region failover. The tech-requirements.md file is at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: refuses_to_add_postgres_as_TR
assertions.check: Response declines to add 'use Postgres ...' as a numbered TR.

assertions.name: explains_decision_vs_requirement
assertions.check: Response explains the distinction between a decision (chosen from options) and a requirement (forced by capability/UX).

assertions.name: asks_for_underlying_requirement
assertions.check: Response asks the user for the underlying constraint (or proposes one) — e.g. queryable by tenant ID with strong consistency, survives single-region failure, etc.

assertions.name: offers_to_park_in_open_questions
assertions.check: Response offers to capture 'consider Postgres + logical replication' (or equivalent) in Open Questions for the ADR stage.

assertions.name: no_postgres_TR_written_to_file
assertions.check: If tech-requirements.md was modified, it does NOT contain a TR with 'use Postgres' (or equivalent technology choice) as the requirement text.
